# Skill: Story Intake and Test Design

## When to use
Use when a new story enters the lifecycle and must be converted into test design artifacts.

## Inputs
- User story text
- Acceptance criteria
- Priority and module metadata

## Steps
1. Normalize story into a structured form (actor, need, value).
2. Validate acceptance criteria clarity and testability.
3. Generate test cases in categories:
   - functional
   - negative
   - boundary
   - integration
4. Map each test case to at least one acceptance criterion.
5. Flag gaps and assumptions for review.

## Outputs
- Test case table
- AC coverage percentage
- Gap list for analyst/PM review
